message:
feat(ftui-text): define layout policy presets and deterministic fallback contract (bd-2vr05.15.2.6)

Implement unified tiered layout policy system that brings together Knuth-Plass
line-breaking, microtypographic justification, and vertical metrics into a
single configuration API with deterministic degradation behavior.

- LayoutTier: Fast (greedy wrapping), Balanced (optimal breaking), Quality (TeX-class typography)
- RuntimeCapability: describes renderer features (proportional fonts, subpixel, hyphenation, tracking)
- LayoutPolicy: user-facing config with presets (FAST, BALANCED, QUALITY) and overrides
- ResolvedPolicy: fully-resolved output with all three subsystem configs
- Degradation path: Quality -> Balanced -> Fast when capabilities insufficient
- 47 unit tests covering tier ordering, capability matching, resolution, overrides, and determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
